title: Forgotten-By-Design
description: Architectural design that enforces forgetting of data or experience, often presented as privacy or safety, but can enable pre-emptive erasure.
indicators: Mandatory obfuscation layers preventing provenance retention
Automated deletion pipelines with no override
Opaque 'sanitization' of input data before storage

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
